hooks.command: if [ -z "$AWARENESS_API_KEY" ] || [ "$AWARENESS_API_KEY" = "aw_your-api-key-here" ] || [ -z "$AWARENESS_MEMORY_ID" ] || [ "$AWARENESS_MEMORY_ID" = "your-memory-id-here" ]; then echo '[Awareness Memory] Not configured yet. Run /awareness-memory:setup to connect your memory in one step.'; else echo '[Awareness Memory] Session started. Run /awareness-memory:session-start to load your project context.'; fi
